description: Molmo2 benchmark config for VISTA comparisons
notes: Use the same prompts with your VISTA pipeline for fair side-by-side comparison.

test_cases.prompt: What is directly in front of me at the 5-second mark? Answer in one phrase.
Which direction should I walk to reach the brick - left, right, straight, or back? Answer with one word.
At what timestamp does the person first use diagonal cutters? Answer with just the time in seconds.
At what timestamp does the bathtub first appear in the video? Answer with just the time in seconds.
At the end of the video, where is the staircase relative to me - right, left, front, back, or can't determine? Answer with one word.
At 30 seconds, where are the concrete walls relative to me - right, left, front, back, or can't determine? Answer with one word.
At the 10-second mark, where is the ladder relative to the worker - right, left, front, or behind? Answer with one word.
How many seconds is the person idle (not doing construction work) in this video? Answer with just the number of seconds.
Where is the bucket at the start of the video vs the end? Answer in the format: start=DIRECTION, end=DIRECTION.
